_comment: Curated overrides for QUEST-scripted hostile-NPC invaders whose kill flags / true positions can't be auto-derived from the 90005792 template. Keyed by MSB EntityID; applies to both profiles (entities/flags verified identical in ERR and vanilla via tools/emevd_decompile.py). 'flag' = clearedEventFlagId source; optional x/y/z = marker position override (e.g. the duel-sign region instead of the parked character part).

1047410701.note: Knight of the Great Jar, duel sign 1 (region 1047412200). Per-knight death flags don't exist - event 1047412301 checks all three IFCharacterDeadAlive live and sets 1047419201 once the whole trio is defeated.

1047410702.note: Knight of the Great Jar, duel sign 2 (region 1047412201).

1047410703.note: Knight of the Great Jar, duel sign 3 (region 1047412202).

11100766.note: Ensha of the Royal Remains (Roundtable invasion; same entity id reused by the m31_90 placement). m11_10 event 11100680: IFCharacterDeadAlive -> SetEventFlag 11109656.

12050705.note: White Mask Varre (Mohgwyn pseudo-multi). Common event 90005796 X0_4=7601 set when X4_4=12050705 dies.

15000705.note: Mary, Eldest Sister (Millicent-assist ambush). 90005797 'end Ver2': flag 7610 set when entity GROUP 15005706 (all four sisters) is dead - per-sister flags don't exist.

15000708.note: Maureen, Second Sister - shared sisters-ambush completion flag 7610.

15000710.note: Amy, Third Sister - shared sisters-ambush completion flag 7610.

15000712.note: Polyanna, Youngest Sister - shared sisters-ambush completion flag 7610.

16000741.note: Tanith's Knight (Crucible Knight guarding Tanith, Volcano Manor). Event 16003706: X0_4 dead -> SetEventFlag 16009264 + AwardItemLot.

22000706.note: Thiollier (DLC hostile phase). Event 22002497: HP<=0 -> SetEventFlag 22000496 + 'Duelist Vanquished' banner.

39200701.note: Great Horned Tragoth (Volcano Manor contract pseudo-multi). 90005796 X0_4=7606.

1043370740.note: Bloody Finger Nerijus (Murkwater invasion). Event 1043373722: X0_4 dead -> SetEventFlag 1043379262.

1053560800.note: Roundtable Knight Vyke (Church of Inhibition). Boss-template event 90005880, X0_4 defeat flag = 1053560800.

15000706.note: Mary, Eldest Sister - second body (c0000_9021, same spot as 15000705); shared sisters-ambush completion flag 7610.

14000710.note: Sorceress Sellen (academy battle, hostile placement). Battle has TWO mutually-exclusive completion flags: 7608 = Sellen battle body 14000713 defeated (90005796 init in m14), 7609 = Jerren defeated (talk-set; referenced by quest state machine common:3479). After either, both NPCs stop being attackable, so both markers should check. Baked with primary 7608; the DLL FLAG_OR_PAIRS runtime swaps to 7609 when that one is set.

14000715.note: Witch-Hunter Jerren (academy battle) - same OR pair 7608/7609 as Sellen, see above.

14000712.note: Sorceress Sellen - body c0000_9016 (same spot as 14000710); OR pair 7608/7609.

14000713.note: Sorceress Sellen - battle body c0000_9017 (whose death sets 7608 via 90005796); OR pair 7608/7609.

14000716.note: Witch-Hunter Jerren - body c0000_9031 (same spot as 14000715); OR pair 7608/7609.

14000717.note: Witch-Hunter Jerren - body c0000_9032 (second placement); OR pair 7608/7609.
